name: victor-workflows
description: Victor's Codex workflow layer built around fat skills and small deterministic CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Fat workflow skills and small CLIs for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex skills that package Victor's workflow judgment, plus small deterministic CLIs for noisy local state such as thread history.
defaultPrompt: Search my recent Codex threads for patterns worth turning into skills.
Find the Codex thread where this workflow went well.
Summarize recent workflow friction from my Codex history.
Reflect on this session and identify workflow improvements.
What should we do next in this repo?
Decide whether this workflow idea should be a skill, CLI, memory rule, or nothing.
Debug this local dev environment failure and identify the smallest verified fix.
